title: paphiopedilum wardii f. alboviride

This plant is prized for its unique white and green markings, and its medicinal properties have been utilized in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The extracts of Paphiopedilum wardii f. alboviride have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body.
